indication: As monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic HER2-positive breast cancer who have received one or more prior anti-HER2-based regimens.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved trastuzumab deruxtecan (Enhertu) for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic HER2-positive breast cancer who have received one or more prior anti-HER2-based regimens.

document.name: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan (Enhertu) Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan (Enhertu) Therapy, 2025, version number 3, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6661/776_v3a_Trastuzumab_Deruxtecan_Therapy.pdf
